Here is the roff source for frobnicate.1:
.TH FROBNICATE 1 "July 2026" "frobnicate 1.0" "User Commands"
.SH NAME
frobnicate \- frobnicate the input
.SH SYNOPSIS
.B frobnicate
[\fIOPTION\fR]... \fIFILE\fR
